description: Login system overhaul, tutorial improvements, mobile updates, Hellgate and Crystal League adjustments, and broad combat balance changes.

sections.heading: Updated Login and Account Creation
sections.description: Changes to login flow and account creation.
items: Replaced 'Remember Password' with automatic login (skips login to character selection)
Streamlined and updated in-game account creation

sections.heading: Improved and Expanded Tutorial
sections.description: Updates to onboarding and tutorial experience.
items: Improved overall tutorial progression
Enhanced visuals and readability across platforms
Added mobile-specific tips and displays
New Dungeon, Expedition, and City Tour quests
Added 'Royal Explorers' NPCs for optional tutorials
sections.searchable_text: tutorial onboarding quests npc royal explorers

sections.heading: Mobile Changes
sections.description: Performance and UI updates for mobile.
items: Minimum Android version increased from 5.0 to 8.0 (APK unaffected)
Increased spell/attack drag radius for better control
Added connection and battery indicators to HUD
Reduced Destiny Board memory usage on low-end devices
sections.searchable_text: mobile android performance hud destiny board

sections.heading: Hellgate Changes
items: Hellgate minibosses now appear on the map
Updated boss icon for better distinction
Increased despawn radius for PvP chests near corpses

sections.heading: Crystal League Registration Changes
items: Players can move within a city without canceling registration
Leaving city, traveling, or visiting islands cancels registration
Does not apply to Territories or Hideouts
Re-registration remembers group leader and streamlines invites
sections.searchable_text: crystal league registration city movement party

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: New characters can join guilds without cooldown for first 7 days
Faction Warfare messages now include captured zone name
Giant Horse renamed to Gallant Horse
Improved reconnection handling
DoT effects keep players in combat until expiration
Healing reduced by 10% in Corrupted Dungeons
sections.searchable_text: guild faction warfare mount rename combat healing corrupted dungeons

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Adjustments across multiple weapon lines and armor.
sections.searchable_text: combat balance axes bows cursed hammers armors

changes.raw_text: Bleed stacks now apply regardless of distance
notes: Applies Rending Bleed stacks to all enemies hit

changes.raw_text: Reduced resistance reduction and removed stacking
notes: Debuff no longer stacks between multiple bows
Applies 3.5s root on entry (scales with IP and modifiers)
Affected by CC resistance and diminishing returns
Removed when leaving area or when it ends

changes.raw_text: Unified regeneration across all armor types
notes: All armor types now have equal 150% regeneration bonus

sections.heading: Fixes
sections.description: Bug fixes across systems and gameplay.
items: Fixed marketplace categories for Avalonian artifacts
Resolved Hellgate mob despawn issues
Fixed stuck combat audio issues
Adjusted Suspicious reputation modifiers
Corrected buff duration display for Flaming Trail
Fixed Slit Throat damage calculation
Corrected tooltips for multiple abilities
Fixed energy consumption for Holy Explosion
Resolved Specter Jacket scaling issue
Fixed missing combat log spell names
Resolved IP requirement bypass in Hellgates
Fixed lingering spell effects in Hellgates
Corrected Corrupted Dungeon tutorial appearing in Hellgates
Fixed crafting time tooltip inconsistencies
Mobile fixes for fishing interruption and drag interactions
Additional graphical, audio, UI, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: fixes hellgate audio tooltip reputation mobile
